steps.title: Identify the number of red tiles and total tiles from the table
steps.content: From the Total row: there are 30 red tiles and 100 tiles total.

steps.title: Calculate the probability
steps.content: The probability is the ratio of red tiles to total tiles: $$P(\text{red}) = \frac{30}{100} = \frac{3}{10} = 0.3$$
